# Copilot instructions for Zaram

- This repository contains a React frontend in the frontend folder and a Python backend in the backend folder.
- Prefer small, targeted changes that preserve the existing architecture.
- For frontend work, keep React components functional, readable, and aligned with the existing Vite/Tailwind setup.
- For backend work, keep Python code simple, explicit, and compatible with the existing FastAPI-style app structure.
- When editing configuration or JSON files, preserve valid syntax and existing keys.
- Do not invent new dependencies or environment variables unless the existing project already uses them.
- Keep responses concise and focused on the task.
